title: PRA Glossary - V
content_markdown:
# PRA Glossary - V

## volatility adjustment

means the adjustment to therelevant risk-free interest rate term structureused to calculate thebest estimatein accordance with:(1)Technical Provisions 8andTechnical Provisions – Further Requirements Part; and(2) [deleted](3) the relevant technical information published by thePRAin accordance with regulation 3(1) of theIRPR regulations.
content_html:
PRA Glossary - V

volatility adjustment
means the adjustment to therelevant risk-free interest rate term structureused to calculate thebest estimatein accordance with:(1)Technical Provisions 8andTechnical Provisions – Further Requirements Part; and(2) [deleted](3) the relevant technical information published by thePRAin accordance with regulation 3(1) of theIRPR regulations.
